title: palura paniculata var. leucocarpa
intro: Palura paniculata var. leucocarpa, also known as the white-fruited palura, is a plant species within the family Rutaceae. The Palura paniculata var. leucocarpa plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant are believed to include the relief of fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Palura paniculata var. leucocarpa include decoctions and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
